description_official: DRAFT — verify against current Coast Guard Rating manuals. Maritime Enforcement Specialists conduct law enforcement, counterterrorism, port security, and anti-terrorism force protection missions.
description_plain: Coast Guard law enforcement. You run boardings, enforce maritime law, support counter-drug operations, and do port security. Strong civilian translation to federal, state, and local law enforcement — CG MEs are often recruited heavily by Border Patrol and other federal agencies.
description_tldr: U.S. Coast Guard law-enforcement rating — boardings, maritime security, counter-drug, and port protection.

asvab.notes: Coast Guard primarily uses minimum AFQT rather than composite line scores for most ratings.

physical_requirements.details: Must pass ME-specific physical screening and psych evaluation; firearms and use-of-force requirements.

compensation.typical_entry_rank: E-3 (Seaman) — some programs promote to E-4 after A-School

civilian_equivalents.title: Federal Law Enforcement Officer (CBP, HSI, DEA, etc.)

sources.name: Coast Guard Rating Information Cards (DRAFT reference)

description_plain: Coast Guard rescue swimmers. ASTs jump out of helicopters into whatever the Atlantic, Pacific, or Gulf of Mexico is doing that day to pull people out of the water. Brutal selection pipeline — one of the highest attrition rates in the U.S. military — and one of the most immediately meaningful missions in the service.
description_tldr: U.S. Coast Guard Aviation Survival Technician — the rescue swimmer; deploys from helicopters to recover people from the water.

asvab.raw_requirement: AFQT minimum 50 + AST-specific water and physical screening (DRAFT)

physical_requirements.details: Extreme water-confidence and fitness standards. AST candidate physical includes 500-yard swim, push-ups, sit-ups, pull-ups, and underwater events.

training_pipeline.description: Airman-level apprenticeship at an air station.

training_pipeline.location: USCG Training Center Elizabeth City, NC
training_pipeline.description: DRAFT — verify. Pipeline includes EMT certification, rescue-swimmer school, and survival-technician training. High attrition.

special_pay.pay_type: Flight Pay / Aviation Career Incentive Pay

cutter_types: Air stations only — AST is an aviation-specific rating

notes: DRAFT — verify pipeline lengths and attrition.
